info.title: ASL API
info.description: API documentation for AMAZING SOULS API

get.summary: List roles assignable when inviting users
Paginated list of users (for admin)

post.summary: Create user and send password-setup email (invite)
post.description: User is created then a reset/invite email is queued. Link base URL uses CLIENT_URL. Provide at least one of role_names or role_ids.

post.summary: Resend password-setup email for an unverified user

200.description: Login successful or OTP challenge required when 2FA is enabled

post.summary: Verify login OTP and complete authentication

get.summary: Verify account email by token query

post.summary: Verify account email by token body

get.summary: Verify account email by token path

post.description: Dispatches a queued job to email a reset link. Response is immediate; delivery uses CLIENT_URL for the SPA link.

200.description: Accepted. If an account exists for that email, a reset link will be sent shortly.

get.summary: Get authenticated user
Verify current auth token

put.summary: Enable or update login OTP for two-factor authentication

get.summary: List authenticated user delivery addresses

post.summary: Create delivery address for authenticated user
post.description: Creates a delivery address and sends in-app notifications to users with Admin and Super Admin roles.

get.summary: Get a specific delivery address for authenticated user

put.summary: Update delivery address for authenticated user
put.description: Updates a delivery address and sends in-app notifications to users with Admin and Super Admin roles.

delete.summary: Delete delivery address for authenticated user
delete.description: Deletes a delivery address and sends in-app notifications to users with Admin and Super Admin roles.

get.summary: List delivery zones (Admin)

post.description: Creates a delivery zone and sends in-app notifications to users with Admin and Super Admin roles.

get.summary: Get delivery zone details (Admin)

put.description: Updates a delivery zone and sends in-app notifications to users with Admin and Super Admin roles.

delete.description: Deletes a delivery zone and sends in-app notifications to users with Admin and Super Admin roles.

get.summary: Check if a zip code is covered for delivery
List published meals for authenticated users
get.description: Returns only published meals. Recipe visibility is filtered by user tier: pro users can see pro-only recipes, signed users cannot.

get.summary: Get one published meal for authenticated users
List meals manageable by current Admin/Partner

post.summary: Create a meal for current Admin/Partner
post.description: Creates a meal with optional nested nutrition, allergens, ingredients, recipes, steps, and tutorials.

get.summary: Get one manageable meal by id

put.description: Supports partial nested updates by replacing nested arrays passed in request payload.

get.summary: List meal categories
Get one meal category
Server-Sent Events stream for real-time notifications
get.description: Opens a persistent SSE connection that pushes unread notifications as `event: notification` messages and heartbeat comments every 5 seconds. Authenticate by passing a Sanctum token as a Bearer header or via the `api_token` query parameter.

parameters.name: api_token
parameters.description: Sanctum personal access token (alternative to Authorization header for SSE clients)

get.summary: Yajra DataTables list of notifications for the authenticated user
Get notification preferences for authenticated user

put.summary: Update notification preferences for authenticated user
put.description: Supports enabling/disabling all notifications, selecting notification types, toggling email notifications, and toggling SMS notifications. When SMS notifications are enabled, a valid phone number is required in E.164-like format (e.g. +254712345678).

patch.summary: Partially update notification preferences for authenticated user

get.summary: List unread notifications
Get unread notifications count
List roles in DataTables format
List available roles
Show a role
List permissions
Get signed URL for a media item

delete.summary: Delete media by path or URL

get.summary: Serve media file using signed URL

sanctum.description: Use a Sanctum personal access token. Swagger will send it as Authorization: Bearer {token}.
